messages.content: I want you to act as a Linux terminal. I will enter commands and you will reply with what the terminal should display. I want you to reply only with the terminal output in a single code block, nothing else. Don’t write explanations. Don’t type commands unless I instruct you to do so. When I need to tell you something in English, I will put the text in brackets [like this]. I need you to 给我创建一个react项目. Your default directory is /app, which has this project. My first command is [ls -aF]

# React App

This is a simple React project.

## Getting Started

1. Clone the repository.
2. Install dependencies using `npm install`.
3. Start the development server using `npm start`.

## Available Scripts

In the project directory, you can run:

- `npm start`: Runs the app in the development mode.
- `npm test`: Launches the test runner.
- `npm run build`: Builds the app for production.
- `npm run eject`: Removes create-react-app build dependency.

**Note:** This project was bootstrapped with [Create React App](https://github.com/facebook/create-react-app).

## Learn More

To learn React, check out the [React documentation](https://reactjs.org/).
请根据我的要求对项目文件进行改动并保存，同时使用git记录本次改动文件，未改动的文件不需要记录，我的要求是：components 里面的 css 路径是错的，应该在 styles 下，请改正它

```sh
mv /app/src/components/Header.css /app/src/styles/header.css
mv /app/src/components/Footer.css /app/src/styles/footer.css
mv /app/src/components/Sidebar.css /app/src/styles/sidebar.css
```

```sh
git add /app/src/styles/header.css
git add /app/src/styles/footer.css
git add /app/src/styles/sidebar.css
```
请根据我的要求对项目文件进行改动并保存，同时使用git记录本次改动文件，未改动的文件不需要记录，我的要求是：我说的是 js import css 路径不对

```sh
sed -i 's/from "\.\/App\.css"/from "\.\/styles\/App\.css"/' /app/src/App.js
sed -i 's/from "\.\/header\.css"/from "\.\/styles\/header\.css"/' /app/src/components/Header.js
sed -i 's/from "\.\/footer\.css"/from "\.\/styles\/footer\.css"/' /app/src/components/Footer.js
sed -i 's/from "\.\/sidebar\.css"/from "\.\/styles\/sidebar\.css"/' /app/src/components/Sidebar.js
```

```sh
git add /app/src/App.js
git add /app/src/components/Header.js
git add /app/src/components/Footer.js
git add /app/src/components/Sidebar.js
```
